notes: This EPD covers a single product: N50/20 Xencrete (50 MPa ready-mix concrete with 20mm nominal aggregate).
Manufacturing plants included: Cameron Park and Singleton, both in Hunter Valley, NSW, Australia.
The A1-A3 combined row is explicitly declared in the LCA results table and used directly.
GWP-total A1-A3 summary on page 2 shows 310 kg CO2e (rounded), while the detailed table on page 8 shows 3.10E+02 = 310 kg CO2e.
GWP-fossil A1-A3 summary shows 309 kg CO2e; detailed table shows 3.09E+02 = 309 kg CO2e.
B1-B7 are all marked ND (Not Declared) in the LCA results table.
Functional unit is 1 cubic meter with a declared unit mass of 2272 kg.
